chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-229 of 2022 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on Misc. No.1144/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on Misc. No.1145/2022 (Ex/A). 3. For orders on Misc. No.1146/2022 (Stay) 4. For hearing of main case -------------------------------------------------------------- 17.1.2022. Mr. Faisal Shahzad, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Advocate for the respondents. >><< 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi is present in Court and has waived notice on behalf of the respondents. Since an appeal is pending before the Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals), we direct the petitioner to pursue the appeal before the said Commissioner, who would hear and decide the same in accordance with law within a shortest possible time. Petition stands disposed of along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
